Hello ##name##,
Boudoir Photography Awards 2024 have been finalized!
After weeks of careful judging by our international panel, the results are now live. Whether you submitted one image or an entire series, your entry has been reviewed, scored, and considered among hundreds of powerful works from around the world.
Ready to see how your work performed?

Check your personal results page now to view your scores, judge feedback, and see how your entry stood out from the link below:
https://www.boudoirinspiration.com/contest-result-user?utm_source=kavyar&utm_campaign=Boudoir%20Photography%20Awards%202024%20Results%20Are%20Ready&utm_medium=email&utm_id=5
Want to explore the winners?

Visit the official results page from the link below to discover this years winners, finalists, and all shortlisted entries  a breathtaking celebration of empowerment, artistry, and bold storytelling in boudoir.
https://www.boudoirinspiration.com/boudoir-photography-awards-2024?utm_source=kavyar&utm_campaign=Boudoir%20Photography%20Awards%202024%20Results%20Are%20Ready&utm_medium=email&utm_id=5
Thank you for being part of this extraordinary journey. Your work inspires, empowers, and elevates the art of boudoir.
Thanks & regards,
Ceren
